name: Holo EVM
summary: A spec-faithful Ethereum Virtual Machine that runs in your browser.

description.p: Running and testing EVM bytecode shouldn't require a node or a server.
A reference EVM engine that passes the official Ethereum consensus tests executes real bytecode and signed transactions, entirely in the browser.

ul: Passes the official Ethereum test suite

releases.description: Real in-browser EVM (EthereumJS reference) execute bytecode & signed txs with an opcode trace; content-addressed Merkle-Patricia κ-store; live mainnet view with RLP→keccak κ-verification of every block (Law L5).
